parking_lot_small.default: You pull into the small parking lot.

time.morning: A few early birds have already claimed the best spots.
time.afternoon: The lot is nearly full during the midday rush.
time.evening: Cars are trickling out as the evening wind down begins.
time.night: The lot is mostly empty, lit by a single flickering lamp.

attribute.PERCEPTION: You clock every car, every plate, every face behind a windshield.
attribute.AGILITY: You weave between vehicles effortlessly, taking the quick route.

gender.male: You cross the lot without a second thought, your mind already on your destination.
gender.female: You stay alert and move quickly — old habits from too many late-night parking lots.

parking_lot_large.default: You enter the large parking lot.

time.morning: Workers and early shoppers fill the rows of the lot.
time.afternoon: The lot buzzes at capacity during peak hours.
time.evening: Headlights sweep across the asphalt as people head home.
time.night: Vast and mostly empty, the lot feels exposed at this hour.

attribute.PERCEPTION: You scan rows of vehicles in seconds, noting anything out of place.
attribute.STEALTH: The maze of parked cars gives you plenty of cover to move unseen.
attribute.AGILITY: You cut between vehicles at a pace no casual driver would manage.

gender.male: The open space doesn't give you pause; you walk directly to where you need to be.
gender.female: You park near the exit and note the fastest route out before anything else.

time.morning: The garage echoes with early-morning arrivals.
time.afternoon: Every level is busy; the ramps hum with traffic.
time.evening: Cars leave in a steady stream as the evening exodus begins.
time.night: The garage is nearly silent, shadows pooling between pillars.

attribute.STEALTH: The dim lighting and concrete pillars make this a perfect place to disappear.
attribute.PERCEPTION: Every sound in here echoes — you can track movement floors away.
attribute.AGILITY: Ramps and tight corners are nothing to you; you move with precision.

gender.male: The concrete shadows don't concern you; you focus on what you came here for.
gender.female: Every parking garage is the same calculation: exits, sightlines, the nearest lit stairwell.

parking_garage_large.default: You enter the multi-level parking garage.

time.morning: Morning commuters spiral upward looking for empty spaces.
time.afternoon: The garage thrums with activity on every level.
time.evening: Rush-hour traffic files out slowly through the exit ramps.
time.night: Most levels are dark and deserted; only the exit signs glow.

attribute.STEALTH: A building this large has dozens of blind spots — you know exactly which ones to use.
attribute.PERCEPTION: You mentally map the camera positions and dead zones in seconds.
attribute.AGILITY: You take the stairs two at a time, moving between levels faster than anyone expects.

gender.male: The scale of the garage is just a logistical problem. You solve it efficiently.
gender.female: You've learned to treat spaces like this as tactical puzzles. You solve this one quickly.

transit_station.default: You step into the transit station.

time.morning: Commuters stream through the turnstiles in the morning rush.
time.afternoon: A quieter midday crowd makes it easier to watch the platforms.
time.evening: The evening rush swells the platforms with tired commuters.
time.night: The last trains of the night bring a sparse, watchful crowd.

attribute.PERCEPTION: You read the crowd instantly — someone here doesn't fit the commuter profile.
attribute.AGILITY: You slip through the crush of bodies without slowing down.
attribute.STAMINA: The constant flow of people and noise is nothing; you stay sharp.

gender.male: You blend into the commuter crowd without effort, just another face heading somewhere.
gender.female: You've learned which groups to move near in a crowd like this, and you position yourself accordingly.

bus_depot.default: You walk into the bus depot.

time.morning: Buses are warming up; drivers check their routes.
time.afternoon: A steady rotation of arrivals and departures keeps things busy.
time.evening: The last evening routes are being prepared.
time.night: Buses rest in ranked rows; only the overnight crew is about.

attribute.STAMINA: The diesel fumes and noise don't bother you — you've been in worse.
attribute.STRENGTH: The sheer scale of the vehicles here commands a certain respect.
attribute.PERCEPTION: You note which buses have been recently moved and which haven't budged in days.

gender.male: The working environment here is familiar territory; nobody questions your presence.
gender.female: A woman in a bus depot draws glances. You've learned how to use that kind of attention.

convenience_store.default: You step into the convenience store.

time.morning: Early risers grab coffee and newspapers before their commute.
time.afternoon: A steady trickle of customers keeps the cashier busy.
time.evening: After-work shoppers stop in for quick essentials.
time.night: The store is almost empty; the fluorescent lights hum loudly.

attribute.PERCEPTION: The placement of the security mirrors tells you exactly where the blind spots are.
attribute.INTUITION: Something about the cashier's behaviour is off — you file it away.

gender.male: You nod at the cashier and get straight to business.
gender.female: The cashier watches the aisle while you browse — protective or suspicious, hard to tell.

gas_station.default: You pull up to the gas station.

time.morning: Commuters queue at the pumps before the morning rush.
time.afternoon: A slow midday lull — the forecourt is quiet.
time.evening: Evening traffic creates a busy stop-start flow at the pumps.
time.night: The canopy lights blaze against the dark; only a lone attendant is inside.

attribute.PERCEPTION: You note the cameras, the angles, the movement patterns — this place has seen trouble before.
attribute.AGILITY: You're in and out before the attendant has finished blinking.
attribute.INTUITION: The vehicle idling near the air pump has been there too long to be just getting fuel.

gender.male: You handle the transaction without a word of small talk, which suits you fine.
gender.female: An attendant offers to check your tyres unprompted. You let them — it's a free look around.

fast_food_restaurant.default: You push through the door of the fast food restaurant.

time.morning: The breakfast rush has the queue backed to the door.
time.afternoon: The lunchtime crowd tests the patience of the overwhelmed staff.
time.evening: Families and teenagers take up most of the booths.
time.night: The night shift crew moves wearily through a near-empty dining room.

attribute.CHARISMA: The server at the counter brightens when you walk up — you have that effect on people.
attribute.PERCEPTION: You clock every face in the dining area before you've even ordered.
attribute.STAMINA: The heavy food and grease-thick air slow most people down. You stay focused.

gender.male: You order without ceremony and find a seat with a clear view of the room.
gender.female: The server is friendlier than they need to be. You use the extra seconds to take stock of the room.

coffee_shop.default: You walk into the coffee shop.

time.morning: The morning rush fills the shop with the aroma of fresh coffee and low chatter.
time.afternoon: Students and remote workers have settled in for the long haul.
time.evening: A mellower crowd winds down over lattes and conversation.
time.night: Only a handful of night owls remain, nursing cold drinks.

attribute.INTELLIGENCE: You pick a seat with a view of every entrance and order something that buys you time.
attribute.MEMORY: You recognise two regulars from a case file — they're meeting here on purpose.
attribute.CHARISMA: The barista starts on your usual before you've reached the counter.

gender.male: You work undisturbed; people rarely interrupt a man focused on a screen.
gender.female: Two men at the counter have been watching you since you sat down. You note them and keep reading.

small_retail_store.default: You enter the small retail store.

time.morning: The store is just opening; shelves freshly stocked.
time.afternoon: A moderate afternoon crowd browses the aisles.
time.evening: End-of-day shoppers move quickly on their way home.
time.night: The shutters are down. The store is closed.

attribute.CHARISMA: The owner greets you like an old friend the moment you step in.
attribute.PERCEPTION: A price tag out of alignment, a recently moved display — small things speak volumes.
attribute.STEALTH: You browse without drawing a single glance from the staff.

gender.male: The shopkeeper watches you from behind the counter, as they do with most male browsers.
gender.female: The owner relaxes when she sees you and comes over to chat. Information flows freely here.

time.morning: Early customers collect prescriptions before the working day begins.
time.afternoon: The pharmacist looks weary from a busy midday rush.
time.evening: A few customers pick up last-minute prescriptions before closing.
time.night: The pharmacy is closed; only the emergency window is lit.

attribute.INTELLIGENCE: The medications on the shelves tell a story about what ailments are common in this neighbourhood.
attribute.EMPATHY: You can see in the customers' faces what they're hoping the white bags will fix.
attribute.PERCEPTION: You notice the pharmacist react to one name on the prescription — recognition, not routine.

gender.male: You browse the shelves without drawing attention — just a customer picking up supplies.
gender.female: The pharmacist addresses you first; women in pharmacies are treated as conversational partners.

bank_branch.default: You step into the bank branch.

time.morning: The doors have just opened; early customers take numbers and wait.
time.afternoon: A steady queue fills the lobby during the lunch-hour rush.
time.evening: The branch is closing up; tellers are counting out their drawers.
time.night: The bank is locked and dark, the ATM the only sign of life.

attribute.INTELLIGENCE: You read the layout immediately — vault access, teller windows, security positions.
attribute.INTIMIDATION: The guard straightens up when you walk past. Good.
attribute.PERCEPTION: A nervous customer near the back is holding their bag too tightly.

gender.male: The teller is professionally guarded, as they are with most men who walk in unannounced.
gender.female: The manager approaches you directly — in their experience, women who come alone have a purpose.

time.morning: A few early regulars load machines before their days begin.
time.afternoon: The hum of washers and dryers fills the warm, damp air.
time.evening: After-work crowds claim the remaining machines.
time.night: Only one or two people sit with their phones, waiting for spin cycles to end.

attribute.PERCEPTION: The person in the corner hasn't looked at their laundry once. They're watching something else.
attribute.MEMORY: You recognise the same face from a different part of town — what are they doing here?
attribute.STEALTH: You blend in perfectly, just another person folding clothes.

gender.male: You take a corner seat, unremarkable among the other waiting customers.
gender.female: The regular at the far machine catches your eye with a nod — you're welcome company here.

hair_salon.default: You step into the hair salon.

time.morning: The stylists are setting up; the first appointments arrive.
time.afternoon: The salon is at full capacity, every chair occupied.
time.evening: Last appointments of the day; the mood is relaxed.
time.night: The salon is closed; chairs draped in plastic, mirrors reflecting empty space.

attribute.CHARISMA: The stylists are instantly at ease with you — conversation flows without effort.
attribute.EMPATHY: You listen to the chatter and hear the real stories between the small talk.
attribute.PERCEPTION: Overheard conversations in here carry more truth than most formal interviews.

gender.male: You're the only man in the salon and everyone knows it. You use the surprised attention well.
gender.female: You're on familiar ground — the rhythm of the place, the trust that forms over a wash and cut.

time.morning: Early risers power through their routines before the workday starts.
time.afternoon: A smaller midday crowd trains at a steadier pace.
time.evening: The after-work crowd fills every station with competitive energy.
time.night: Only the most dedicated are still pushing themselves this late.

attribute.STRENGTH: You feel right at home — the weights, the chalk, the iron. This is your element.
attribute.STAMINA: Your eyes go straight to the cardio section. You could outlast everyone here.
attribute.AGILITY: You size up the open training floor immediately, already planning your footwork drills.

gender.male: Two regulars offer you a spot within minutes of your warm-up. The gym's social code is straightforward.
gender.female: You move to the free weights. Three people stop what they're doing to watch. You ignore them completely.

strip_mall.default: You walk along the strip mall.

time.morning: A few shops are still rolling up their shutters.
time.afternoon: The strip mall is busy with errands and foot traffic.
time.evening: Most stores are closing; the fast-food end stays busy.
time.night: Shuttered storefronts stretch in both directions; only the drive-through is lit.

attribute.PERCEPTION: You take in every storefront in a single sweep, noting the unusual among the routine.
attribute.CHARISMA: Shop owners nod at you like a regular even on a first visit.
attribute.STEALTH: The constant foot traffic makes you invisible — just another face in the crowd.

gender.male: You move through the strip mall efficiently, drawing no particular attention.
gender.female: A couple of shop owners say hello — you're a friendlier face than most who walk past.

time.morning: The center has just opened; staff outnumber shoppers.
time.afternoon: Families and groups of friends crowd the walkways.
time.evening: The food court fills up as the last hour of trading begins.
time.night: Security patrols the dark, empty concourse.

attribute.CHARISMA: People seem to gravitate toward you — you're approached before you even stop walking.
attribute.PERCEPTION: You track the flow of shoppers, spotting anyone who's loitering with no purchase intent.
attribute.STEALTH: You move with the crowd, unremarkable and untraceable.

gender.male: You move against the grain of the browsing crowd, which makes you faster.
gender.female: You blend into the natural flow of the shopping center without a second thought.

regional_mall.default: You step inside the regional mall.

time.morning: Mall walkers and early shoppers fill the quiet ground floor.
time.afternoon: The weekend crowd packs every escalator and food court seat.
time.evening: Last-minute shoppers rush before the shutters come down.
time.night: The vast interior is dark except for exit lighting; security makes rounds.

attribute.CHARISMA: You move through the crowd effortlessly — conversations start without you trying.
attribute.PERCEPTION: In a place this busy, you still spot the one person who doesn't belong.
attribute.STEALTH: The sheer scale of this place makes you functionally invisible.

gender.male: You stand out slightly — most men move through malls with obvious purpose. You use that assumption.
gender.female: You're invisible here in the best sense — just another shopper among thousands.

time.morning: Shelves are freshly stocked; the early crowd is orderly and quiet.
time.afternoon: The aisles are busy with purposeful shoppers working through lists.
time.evening: The after-work rush turns every checkout into a queue.
time.night: Night-shift staff restock the shelves in near-silence.

attribute.PERCEPTION: The product placement, the security positioning, the layout — you read it all at a glance.
attribute.MEMORY: You remember the prices from last week; something has changed, and not by chance.
attribute.INTELLIGENCE: The supply chain tells a story if you know how to read the gaps on the shelves.

gender.male: You move through the aisles with a list and a pace that says you're not here to browse.
gender.female: You chat briefly with the person at the deli counter. People share things in passing they'd never say directly.

warehouse_store.default: You push a cart through the warehouse store.

time.morning: Families stock up early while the store is at its quietest.
time.afternoon: Pallets are being shifted mid-aisle, slowing the afternoon traffic.
time.evening: Last-minute bulk shoppers clog the checkout lines.
time.night: The store is closed; the enormous parking lot stands empty.

attribute.STRENGTH: The scale of this place feels natural to you — the heavy loads, the wide aisles.
attribute.STAMINA: The sheer size demands energy most people underestimate.
attribute.PERCEPTION: You track the staff movements and camera angles automatically as you walk.

gender.male: You navigate the warehouse floor like you belong here, which you do.
gender.female: Staff are slightly more helpful than necessary. You accept every offer — each one is an opportunity to ask questions.

restaurant_casual.default: You step inside the casual restaurant.

time.morning: The breakfast crowd lingers over coffee and eggs.
time.afternoon: The lunchtime rush fills most tables with office workers.
time.evening: Families and couples fill the dining room; the noise level is comfortable.
time.night: The kitchen is winding down; a few late-nighters remain at the bar.

attribute.CHARISMA: The host seats you immediately, with a smile that says you're remembered.
attribute.EMPATHY: You can read the table dynamics of every group without trying.
attribute.PERCEPTION: You scan the room the moment you're seated — habits die hard.

gender.male: You take a solo table without issue; the staff treat it as routine.
gender.female: The host seats you immediately, with a smile that says solo diners are welcome here.

restaurant_fine_dining.default: You enter the fine dining restaurant.

time.morning: The dining room is closed; prep staff work in near-silence.
time.afternoon: A quiet lunch service attends to well-dressed regulars.
time.evening: The full evening service transforms the room; every table has a story.
time.night: The last diners linger; the staff moves with quiet efficiency to close.

attribute.CHARISMA: The maitre d' recognises authority when they see it and attends to you immediately.
attribute.INTELLIGENCE: The menu, the wine list, the clientele — you read the room like a dossier.
attribute.EMPATHY: You pick up on the tension at a nearby table before a single word is raised.

gender.male: The maitre d' sizes up your confidence rather than your clothes and decides to be helpful.
gender.female: The maitre d' attends to you immediately — a woman dining alone in a place like this is either confident or important. You are both.

car_dealership.default: You walk onto the car dealership floor.

time.morning: Salespeople are prepping their pitches for the day.
time.afternoon: Test drives and negotiations fill the showroom.
time.evening: End-of-day deals are being pushed hard; quota pressure is visible.
time.night: The showroom is lit but locked; rows of vehicles wait behind glass.

attribute.CHARISMA: The salesperson backs off the hard pitch within thirty seconds of meeting you.
attribute.INTELLIGENCE: You know the invoice price before the salesperson opens their mouth.
attribute.INTUITION: Something about the lot manager's story doesn't add up.

gender.male: The salesperson launches into their pitch before you've said hello.
gender.female: The salesperson underestimates you within ten seconds. That gives you the first of many advantages.

auto_repair_shop.default: You step into the auto repair shop.

time.morning: Mechanics start engines and run diagnostics as the day begins.
time.afternoon: The shop is in full swing; the bay is full of lifted vehicles.
time.evening: The last jobs of the day are being wrapped up.
time.night: The shutters are down; the shop is dark except for one office light.

attribute.STRENGTH: The physical work here is in your vocabulary — you respect the graft.
attribute.INTELLIGENCE: Modern diagnostics are half the job; you speak the language of both wrenches and code.
attribute.PERCEPTION: One of the vehicles in the back lot isn't here for repairs.

gender.male: You speak the language of the shop floor; the mechanics treat you as a peer.
gender.female: The mechanic adjusts their explanation when they see you're following every detail. Respect is earned quickly here.

time.morning: The waiting room fills up quickly after the doors open.
time.afternoon: A long afternoon queue works its way through triage.
time.evening: The last appointments of the day are running late.
time.night: The clinic is closed; a note on the door redirects emergencies to urgent care.

attribute.INTELLIGENCE: Medical terminology, drug interactions, dosage anomalies — you catch details the staff skim past.
attribute.EMPATHY: You can see in patients' expressions what they're afraid to say out loud.
attribute.PERCEPTION: A patient in the corner has been waiting far too long for a routine visit.

gender.male: The receptionist is efficient and brisk — standard procedure for a walk-in.
gender.female: The nurse at triage takes a moment longer with you than the forms require. You use it.

time.morning: Early patients arrive looking resigned; nobody loves the dentist.
time.afternoon: The appointment schedule is backed up from a slow morning.
time.evening: The last patient of the day heads for the exit, cheek still numb.
time.night: The office is locked and dark; the receptionist's desk is cleared.

attribute.EMPATHY: You're unusually good at putting nervous patients at ease.
attribute.INTELLIGENCE: The x-rays on the light box tell a story beyond just teeth.
attribute.PERCEPTION: The tension between the dentist and a staff member is noticeable even from the waiting room.

gender.male: You sit in the waiting room in the standard uncomfortable silence.
gender.female: The receptionist strikes up conversation easily. Dental waiting rooms are surprisingly good for information.

veterinary_clinic.default: You step into the veterinary clinic.

time.morning: Anxious owners and their animals pack the morning waiting room.
time.afternoon: Routine check-ups keep the afternoon schedule ticking over.
time.evening: The last few evening appointments play out in a quieter clinic.
time.night: The clinic is closed for regular hours; emergency cases only.

attribute.EMPATHY: The animals sense something calming in you — even the anxious ones settle.
attribute.INTELLIGENCE: You understand the diagnostics being discussed. The owner in the corner does not.
attribute.INTUITION: The owner of the patient in exam room two is not telling the full story.

gender.male: The vet tech barely looks up — they're used to anxious owners of all kinds.
gender.female: The vet tech softens immediately; in their experience, women who bring animals are usually worth talking to.

time.morning: The morning shift brings a flurry of ward rounds and new admissions.
time.afternoon: A steady stream of outpatient appointments flows through the lobby.
time.evening: Visiting hours draw families; the corridors grow briefly louder.
time.night: Night staff move through the quiet wards; emergencies are the only disruption.

attribute.INTELLIGENCE: Medical charts and equipment configurations don't escape your notice.
attribute.EMPATHY: Every person you pass carries a weight — you feel it without asking.
attribute.STAMINA: The relentless pace and constant noise would wear most people down. Not you.

gender.male: Staff are efficient and professional; nobody offers unsolicited guidance.
gender.female: A nurse stops to ask if you need directions. You don't, but the pause gives you a moment to observe.

hospital_large.default: You step into the large hospital.

time.morning: The complex hums with the controlled urgency of morning handovers.
time.afternoon: Multiple wings operate simultaneously; the scale is impressive.
time.evening: Visiting hours create a social hum within the clinical calm.
time.night: The overnight skeleton crew maintains the quiet vigilance of the hospital at night.

attribute.INTELLIGENCE: A facility this large has inefficiencies in every department. You see them all.
attribute.EMPATHY: The weight of hope and grief here is palpable. You carry it without being crushed.
attribute.PERCEPTION: You notice an unusual figure moving through a restricted area without an ID badge.

gender.male: You move through the hospital as if you have a destination, which keeps most staff from questioning you.
gender.female: A porter offers to help you find your way. You decline politely and file away the offer for later.

urgent_care.default: You walk into the urgent care center.

time.morning: The morning brings a wave of overnight injuries and illnesses.
time.afternoon: Afternoon walk-ins keep the triage desk busy.
time.evening: The evening rush brings minor injuries from active days.
time.night: Night brings the worst cases — the center is strained but functioning.

attribute.PERCEPTION: A patient's story and their injury don't match. You clock the inconsistency.
attribute.STAMINA: The intensity here doesn't flag all day. Neither do you.
attribute.EMPATHY: You read pain levels and fear in faces better than most intake forms could.

gender.male: The intake clerk processes you without ceremony — this place has no time for small talk.
gender.female: The nurse at intake asks twice if you're sure you're alright. You appreciate the concern and note who else is watching.

time.morning: Tearful drop-offs and cheerful staff mark the start of the morning.
time.afternoon: The afternoon is a storm of structured play and small dramas.
time.evening: Parents arrive for pick-up; the noise level rises then drops suddenly.
time.night: The center is locked and quiet; the only sound is a forgotten toy's battery running low.

attribute.EMPATHY: You instinctively lower your voice and crouch to eye level. The children warm to you.
attribute.CHARISMA: The staff are guarded with strangers — but you put them at ease within moments.
attribute.PERCEPTION: One child's behaviour is telling you something their words can't.

gender.male: The staff are politely cautious at first — an unfamiliar man in a daycare draws careful attention.
gender.female: The staff welcome you with the openness of people used to parents dropping in unannounced.

time.morning: Morning assembly echoes through the corridors as the day begins.
time.afternoon: Classes are in session; the halls are briefly empty between periods.
time.evening: After-school clubs and sports practice fill the grounds.
time.night: The school is locked; a janitorial cart sits outside a classroom.

attribute.EMPATHY: Children have a radar for genuine kindness — they can tell you have it.
attribute.CHARISMA: Teachers and staff relax in your presence. You carry a natural authority without menace.
attribute.PERCEPTION: A detail in one of the classrooms catches your eye — it doesn't belong.

gender.male: The office staff are professionally watchful — protocol for an unfamiliar male visitor.
gender.female: You're waved through the office with warm efficiency. The assumption is that you belong here.

high_school.default: You walk through the high school.

time.morning: Students arrive in clusters, the social geometry already established.
time.afternoon: Hallways between lessons are a brief, chaotic pulse of movement.
time.evening: Team practice, drama rehearsal, detention — the school has many afterlives.
time.night: The building is dark; only the security lights mark the perimeter.

attribute.INTELLIGENCE: You read the social dynamics here like a document — hierarchies, alliances, fault lines.
attribute.CHARISMA: Students and teachers alike respond to you; you project the right kind of confidence.
attribute.PERCEPTION: You notice who is absent from where they should be.

gender.male: Students and staff alike give you the standard assessment — visitor, authority, or threat. You let them settle on authority.
gender.female: The front office treats you with collegial ease. Assumptions can be useful when they're working in your favour.

time.morning: Morning classes fill the lecture halls with attentive students.
time.afternoon: Study groups form in the library and common areas.
time.evening: Evening classes bring older students balancing work and study.
time.night: The campus quiets down; only the library and a few labs remain lit.

attribute.INTELLIGENCE: You absorb the course materials on the notice board in seconds — and spot the anomaly.
attribute.MEMORY: Academic environments are comfortable territory; you retain everything.
attribute.CHARISMA: Students and faculty alike find you approachable and worth talking to.

gender.male: You're taken as a lecturer or administrator; no one questions your presence.
gender.female: You're taken as a student first, which suits you — people underestimate students.

fire_station.default: You step into the fire station.

time.morning: The morning shift checks equipment and runs drills with focused precision.
time.afternoon: The afternoon brings a call-out; the station empties in seconds.
time.evening: The evening shift takes over; the crew shares a meal in the common room.
time.night: The station is quiet between calls; crew members doze ready to respond.

attribute.STRENGTH: The crew recognises your build immediately. You're one of them by type, if not by badge.
attribute.STAMINA: The physical demands of this place match your output. You feel at home.
attribute.AGILITY: The obstacle courses and gear routes here are second nature to you.

gender.male: The crew sizes you up in the physical way firefighters always do — and nods.
gender.female: The station goes slightly quiet when you walk in. You've seen this reaction before and know exactly how to work it.

time.morning: The station buzzes with morning briefings and officers starting their shifts.
time.afternoon: A steady stream of reports and interviews keeps the afternoon busy.
time.evening: The day shift is winding down; night-shift officers are checking in.
time.night: Only the night-duty officers remain, the station quieter but watchful.

attribute.PERCEPTION: You pick up on the subtle tension between two officers near the board — something happened recently.
attribute.INTIMIDATION: Heads turn as you walk in. Your presence commands attention even here.
attribute.INTELLIGENCE: The case board catches your eye; you spot a connection the team might have missed.
attribute.CHARISMA: You exchange a nod with the desk sergeant. People like you here — they'll talk.

gender.male: The officers treat you with the guarded professional neutrality they reserve for visitors with authority.
gender.female: Some officers register surprise before the professional mask goes back on. You note which ones and start there.

time.morning: The morning queue forms fast — everyone wants to be first.
time.afternoon: A manageable lunchtime crowd works through the numbered tickets.
time.evening: The counter is down to one window as the day draws to a close.
time.night: The post office is shut; parcels await in a locked sorting room.

attribute.MEMORY: You recognise a regular from an unrelated case — this is not a coincidence.
attribute.PERCEPTION: The parcel being collected at window three is the one you've been looking for.
attribute.INTELLIGENCE: Sorting codes, postmarks, routing slips — this place is full of intelligence if you know to look.

gender.male: The clerk is efficient and businesslike — standard service for a standard customer.
gender.female: The clerk chats while processing. Postal workers hear more than most people realise, and they like to share it.

time.morning: The library is quiet, its early patrons absorbed in their reading.
time.afternoon: Students and researchers fill the reading tables in the afternoon light.
time.evening: The library is peaceful in the evening glow, the shelves casting long shadows.
time.night: The library is closed. Only a faint light from the back suggests someone is still inside.

attribute.INTELLIGENCE: Your gaze sweeps the stacks methodically; you already know exactly which section you need.
attribute.MEMORY: Titles and call numbers leap out at you — you've been here before and remember every shelf.
attribute.PERCEPTION: A book slightly out of place, a bookmark left carelessly — someone was here recently and in a hurry.
attribute.INTUITION: Something about the atmosphere feels off. The silence is a little too deliberate.

gender.male: The librarian leaves you to your research without comment or offer.
gender.female: The librarian offers to pull additional references for you. You accept — two sets of eyes are always better.

community_center.default: You step into the community center.

time.morning: Morning fitness classes and coffee groups bring the first wave of visitors.
time.afternoon: After-school programmes and committee meetings fill the afternoon.
time.evening: Evening events — classes, meetings, socials — make this the busiest time.
time.night: The last visitors clear out; staff stack chairs and lock up.

attribute.CHARISMA: People here are open and community-minded — they warm to you immediately.
attribute.EMPATHY: You hear the real needs behind the organised activities and small talk.
attribute.PERCEPTION: A face you recognise is here for reasons beyond community spirit.

gender.male: You're welcomed into the social flow; the center is used to new faces.
gender.female: People here share things with you they might not share with a male stranger. You listen without interrupting.

time.morning: Officials and public servants start their day with meetings and briefings.
time.afternoon: Council sessions and public consultations run through the afternoon.
time.evening: The building empties as staff head home; a few lights still burn.
time.night: City hall is locked; security cameras watch empty corridors.

attribute.INTELLIGENCE: Permit records, planning maps, budget reports — the truth is always in the paperwork.
attribute.CHARISMA: Council members and clerks respond to you with unusual openness.
attribute.INTIMIDATION: Officials become measurably more cooperative when you maintain eye contact.

gender.male: Officials read you as someone with authority and respond accordingly — doors open faster.
gender.female: A clerk offers to guide you through the process. You let them, because the longer the conversation, the more you learn.

time.morning: Early hearings draw lawyers, defendants, and witnesses through the metal detectors.
time.afternoon: The courtrooms are in full session; the hallways are hushed.
time.evening: Proceedings wind down; legal teams caucus in the corridors.
time.night: The courthouse is closed. Only a duty officer remains at the front desk.

attribute.INTELLIGENCE: You read the body language of every witness, lawyer, and judge in the room.
attribute.INTIMIDATION: Your bearing alone shifts the dynamic in an interrogation room or courtroom gallery.
attribute.PERCEPTION: The defendant's micro-expressions tell you what the transcript never will.

gender.male: You're read as a lawyer or official — the most convenient assumption for your purposes.
gender.female: A female presence in the courthouse gallery draws less suspicion than a male one. You use the relative invisibility well.

time.morning: Residents in work clothes jostle for the elevator.
time.afternoon: The building is quieter during the working day.
time.evening: The smell of cooking and the murmur of TV sets drift through the halls.
time.night: The building is still; only the hum of a refrigerator breaks the silence.

attribute.PERCEPTION: You note which buzzers are taped over, which mailboxes are overflowing.
attribute.STEALTH: You move through the building without drawing a single curtain twitch.
attribute.EMPATHY: You hear the conversations behind these doors — the ordinary and the troubled.

gender.male: You move through the building without attracting comment — just another resident.
gender.female: A neighbour in the corridor holds the door and asks if you're new here. You give a vague smile and keep moving.

medium_apartment_building.default: You step into the apartment building.

time.morning: The lobby is busy with residents beginning their day.
time.afternoon: A quiet period settles over the building mid-afternoon.
time.evening: The building comes alive again as residents return.
time.night: Lights blink off floor by floor as the building sleeps.

attribute.PERCEPTION: Worn carpet, fresh paint on one door only, a new lock — the building tells its own story.
attribute.STEALTH: You take the stairs. Nobody uses the stairs, which is exactly why you do.
attribute.CHARISMA: The super greets you with more warmth than most residents ever get.

gender.male: You ride the elevator without eye contact — the universal language of apartment buildings.
gender.female: The super comes out to check on a noise complaint just as you arrive. Convenient timing.

large_apartment_building.default: You enter the large apartment building.

time.morning: The lobby revolves with departing residents heading to work.
time.afternoon: Deliveries stack up at the front desk.
time.evening: Returning residents and food delivery riders create a busy crossover.
time.night: The building quietens; the overnight concierge sits at a near-empty desk.

attribute.PERCEPTION: A building this large has patterns. You read them: who's on schedule, who isn't.
attribute.STEALTH: In a building this busy, being invisible is just a matter of timing.
attribute.CHARISMA: The concierge lets you through without question — you carry yourself like a resident.

gender.male: You carry yourself like a resident and no one in the lobby looks twice.
gender.female: The concierge makes brief conversation. Building staff remember women who pass through — it's useful to be memorable.

luxury_apartment_tower.default: You enter the luxury apartment tower.

time.morning: Immaculate lobby staff greet the first residents of the morning.
time.afternoon: A quiet, curated calm settles over the tower during the day.
time.evening: Residents return in luxury vehicles; doormen earn their keep.
time.night: The upper floors are lit against the skyline; the lobby is a study in understated wealth.

attribute.CHARISMA: You carry yourself with the quiet confidence of someone who belongs here.
attribute.PERCEPTION: Even in a place this polished, cracks appear if you know where to look.
attribute.INTELLIGENCE: Security protocols, camera placements, resident schedules — you read the building like a floor plan.

gender.male: Your confidence reads as wealth to the lobby staff. They respond in kind.
gender.female: The concierge upgrades their attention to you immediately. A woman entering a tower like this has a reason.

highrise_apartment_complex.default: You step into the high-rise apartment complex.

time.morning: Elevators are full during the morning departure rush.
time.afternoon: The complex is largely empty; deliveries dominate the lobby.
time.evening: The building hums as residents cook, watch TV, and make calls.
time.night: The complex is quiet at last; only the security desk has its light on.

attribute.CHARISMA: You carry yourself with the ease of someone who lives here. Security waves you through.
attribute.PERCEPTION: Hundreds of people live here, but you notice the one who doesn't fit the routine.
attribute.STEALTH: In the anonymity of a complex this size, you could disappear completely.

gender.male: You pass through the lobby with the unremarkable efficiency of a regular.
gender.female: You're noticed, but that's not always a disadvantage. You control what they notice.

townhouse_row.default: You walk along the townhouse row.

time.morning: Residents leave for work and school in a quiet suburban rhythm.
time.afternoon: The street is calm; only a few cars pass.
time.evening: Lights come on in living rooms; the smell of dinner drifts from open windows.
time.night: The row is dark and still; a dog barks once and falls silent.

attribute.PERCEPTION: You read the small signals — which lawns are kept, which blinds never open.
attribute.EMPATHY: You sense the underlying community tensions before anyone mentions them.
attribute.STEALTH: You move along the row without disturbing the quiet — a skill not everyone has.

gender.male: You walk the row without drawing particular attention — just someone passing through.
gender.female: A resident doing their garden pauses to say hello. Neighbourhoods like this remember unfamiliar women more than unfamiliar men.

time.morning: Residents with coffee cups and briefcases crowd the lobby at opening.
time.afternoon: A quieter afternoon follows the morning rush.
time.evening: The building fills back up as working residents return.
time.night: The lobby dims to night mode; the concierge switches to the overnight roster.

attribute.CHARISMA: The concierge smiles before you've said a word — you have that effect.
attribute.PERCEPTION: You spot a face from a case file reflected in the lobby mirror.
attribute.STEALTH: You read the shift schedule instinctively and pick the right moment to move unseen.

gender.male: The concierge gives you a professionally neutral greeting.
gender.female: The concierge is more forthcoming with you than with most; it's a small thing, but useful.

senior_living_facility.default: You step into the senior living facility.

time.morning: Morning routines — breakfast, medications, exercises — proceed with gentle regularity.
time.afternoon: Activities, visitors, and quiet reading fill the afternoon hours.
time.evening: Dinner service brings residents together; the common room is warmly lit.
time.night: The facility is quiet and calm; night staff conduct their gentle rounds.

attribute.EMPATHY: You have genuine patience here — listening costs you nothing and earns you everything.
attribute.MEMORY: The residents' long memories are a resource. You know exactly what questions to ask.
attribute.CHARISMA: Staff and residents trust you quickly. Something about your manner reassures them.

gender.male: The staff are politely cautious — unfamiliar men in residential care settings get a second look.
gender.female: The residents warm to you quickly; the staff even more so. You fit the expected profile of a visitor here.

hotel_budget.default: You check into the budget hotel.

time.morning: The breakfast queue moves sluggishly; the coffee is adequate at best.
time.afternoon: The lobby is a crossroads of transient guests and their luggage.
time.evening: Check-in rush brings a long queue to the single front-desk clerk.
time.night: The corridors are thin-walled and lively long past midnight.

attribute.PERCEPTION: You note the room numbers of interest before you've even reached yours.
attribute.STEALTH: The indifferent staff and anonymous guests make you effectively invisible.
attribute.MEMORY: You've stayed in places exactly like this. You know every corner, every exit.

gender.male: The night clerk barely looks up from the screen. Anonymous service for an anonymous guest.
gender.female: The front desk clerk is slightly more attentive than necessary. You note who else is watching the exchange.

hotel_business.default: You check into the business hotel.

time.morning: The breakfast room is full of laptop screens and muffled calls.
time.afternoon: The lobby serves as an informal meeting room for suited guests.
time.evening: The bar fills with conference delegates unwinding after long sessions.
time.night: The hotel settles into a professional quiet after midnight.

attribute.CHARISMA: The front desk upgrades your room without you asking. You have the right kind of presence.
attribute.INTELLIGENCE: The guest roster at check-in gives you more information than the hotel intends.
attribute.PERCEPTION: You clock the surveillance setup within seconds of crossing the lobby.

gender.male: You check in with the efficiency that marks the business hotel's bread and butter.
gender.female: A woman checking into a business hotel alone draws a particular kind of attention. You let it land and redirect it.

time.morning: A white-gloved breakfast service runs with silent precision.
time.afternoon: The afternoon is defined by spa appointments and discreet meetings.
time.evening: The restaurant fills with guests dressed for the occasion.
time.night: The hotel purrs with a midnight calm that money has carefully constructed.

attribute.CHARISMA: The concierge treats you like a preferred guest before you've said your name.
attribute.EMPATHY: You read the undercurrents between guests — this hotel holds many secrets.
attribute.INTELLIGENCE: Luxury is a language. You speak it fluently and note who doesn't.

gender.male: The concierge treats you with the precision that expensive hotels reserve for guests who could cause a scene.
gender.female: The hotel staff attend to you with a warmth that says you belong here. You do — for now.

office_building_small.default: You step into the small office building.

time.morning: Staff arrive and settle into the familiar rhythms of the work day.
time.afternoon: The midday lull is broken by a brief flurry of meetings.
time.evening: Most desks are clearing; a few lights remain on past hours.
time.night: The building is dark. A single light burns on an upper floor.

attribute.INTELLIGENCE: The layout, the org chart on the wall, the room allocations — you read it all in a glance.
attribute.PERCEPTION: Small offices have small secrets that are hard to keep. You spot three within two minutes.
attribute.STEALTH: You move through the open-plan floor without drawing a single pair of eyes.

gender.male: Staff pass you in the corridor with the polite indifference given to most unfamiliar visitors.
gender.female: The receptionist offers to let someone know you've arrived. You decline — unannounced is better.

time.morning: Elevators fill and empty as the morning shift settles in.
time.afternoon: A steady hum of meetings and keyboard work fills the afternoon.
time.evening: The building empties floor by floor as the evening arrives.
time.night: Security makes rounds through dark, quiet corridors.

attribute.INTELLIGENCE: You analyse the organisational structure from the directory board and draw fast conclusions.
attribute.PERCEPTION: Someone has recently been to the floor above yours — the elevator's panel still shows it.
attribute.EMPATHY: You can feel the pressure and fatigue of staff even through their professional masks.

gender.male: You carry the kind of authority that office buildings are designed to accommodate.
gender.female: You move with purpose and nobody stops you. Purpose is its own kind of credential.

office_building_large.default: You enter the large office building.

time.morning: The lobby revolves with a thousand commuters beginning their nine-to-five.
time.afternoon: Conference rooms are booked solid through the afternoon.
time.evening: The building empties quickly after five; only the ambitious stay.
time.night: Cleaners and security have the building to themselves.

attribute.INTELLIGENCE: A building this size is a city in miniature. You navigate its politics instinctively.
attribute.CHARISMA: Your visitor's badge should slow you down. Somehow it never does.
attribute.PERCEPTION: You notice the executive floor elevator is showing unusual activity for this time of day.

gender.male: Your visitor's badge should slow you down. Your manner makes it unnecessary.
gender.female: Dressed for the part, you pass through a building like this without a second glance from the security desk.

corporate_headquarters.default: You step into the corporate headquarters.

time.morning: The executive floors are already in motion; global calls started at dawn.
time.afternoon: Board-level meetings and media delegations fill the afternoon schedule.
time.evening: The lobbying and networking events that define corporate life run long into the evening.
time.night: The building sleeps, but the servers don't.

attribute.INTELLIGENCE: Power is concentrated here. You understand its mechanisms and how to interrupt them.
attribute.CHARISMA: Senior executives open doors for you. You give them no reason not to.
attribute.INTIMIDATION: Your demeanour makes it clear you will not be managed, redirected, or ignored.

gender.male: You carry the weight of someone used to rooms like this. People get out of your way.
gender.female: Boardrooms like this are not always welcoming territory, but you've never needed them to be.

coworking_space.default: You walk into the coworking space.

time.morning: Early freelancers and startup founders claim the best seats before nine.
time.afternoon: The space reaches peak population mid-afternoon; conversation fills the air.
time.evening: The evening crowd is younger and noisier — tonight's product launch is somewhere in here.
time.night: The space is closed; hot desks sit vacant until morning.

attribute.INTELLIGENCE: You read pitches, code, and conversations simultaneously without appearing to.
attribute.CHARISMA: People introduce themselves to you before you've had a chance to ask.
attribute.PERCEPTION: Coworking spaces are deliberately open. That makes what's hidden here all the more interesting.

gender.male: You claim a desk and people assume you're a member. You don't correct them.
gender.female: Someone offers to introduce you around within thirty seconds. Social capital is currency here.

time.morning: The first screenings attract retirees and the deliberately unemployed.
time.afternoon: Family matinees and date afternoons fill the middle of the day.
time.evening: The prime evening screenings sell out; the lobby is at capacity.
time.night: Late-night screenings serve insomniacs and film obsessives.

attribute.PERCEPTION: You find the blind spot in the lobby camera coverage within thirty seconds.
attribute.MEMORY: You remember the last time you were in a theater exactly like this — and how it ended.
attribute.STEALTH: The darkness of the auditorium is your natural element.

gender.male: You buy a ticket, find a seat with a clear sightline to the exit, and wait.
gender.female: You take the aisle seat — the unwritten rule that women in public spaces learn early.

bowling_alley.default: You walk into the bowling alley.

time.morning: Leagues take over the lanes in the quiet morning sessions.
time.afternoon: Families and groups of friends fill the afternoon.
time.evening: The place is loud and social; the bar is doing good business.
time.night: Cosmic bowling kicks in — black lights, music, a very different crowd.

attribute.AGILITY: Your approach to the lane is smooth; you've always had a feel for the weight and the roll.
attribute.CHARISMA: You're invited to join a lane before you've even rented shoes.
attribute.PERCEPTION: The group at lane seven isn't here to bowl.

gender.male: You're invited to join a lane before you've even rented shoes.
gender.female: You're underestimated at the lane next to yours. You let the score correct that assumption.

time.morning: The club is closed; cleaners sweep up the aftermath of last night.
time.afternoon: The nightclub is dark and silent in the afternoon.
time.evening: Pre-opening prep — lights, sound checks, staff briefings.
time.night: The music hits you before the door is fully open. This is when the nightclub lives.

attribute.CHARISMA: The VIP entrance opens without a word exchanged.
attribute.STEALTH: You move through the crowd without leaving a trace in anyone's memory.
attribute.INTUITION: The energy in here has an undertone the regular crowd hasn't noticed.

gender.male: You make it past the door without incident — the right look, the right manner.
gender.female: The door staff wave you through ahead of the queue. Access has its own complications.

time.morning: The arena is empty; groundskeepers and tech crews do their work.
time.afternoon: Pre-game activity begins to build as the crowd starts to filter in.
time.evening: The main event fills every seat; the atmosphere is electric.
time.night: The post-game crowd streams out; the arena begins its slow reset.

attribute.STRENGTH: You read the physical performance on display with an expert's eye.
attribute.STAMINA: The noise, the crowd, the energy — it charges you rather than overwhelming you.
attribute.AGILITY: You navigate the dense, moving crowd with a fluency most people never achieve.

gender.male: You're unremarkable in a crowd like this, which is exactly what you want.
gender.female: You draw fewer glances than a woman in a sports crowd used to — times have changed enough to be useful.

time.morning: Delivery vans unload as the morning shift begins.
time.afternoon: The afternoon is a steady cycle of picking, packing, and dispatch.
time.evening: The last shipments of the day leave the loading bay.
time.night: The warehouse is locked; motion sensors cover every corner.

attribute.STRENGTH: Pallets, forklifts, and heavy freight are your natural context.
attribute.PERCEPTION: You spot the inventory discrepancy within minutes of scanning the shelves.
attribute.STEALTH: The aisles of racking give you more cover than most people realise.

gender.male: The workers take you for a delivery rep or a manager. Either way, you're left alone.
gender.female: A woman on a warehouse floor prompts questions. You have an answer ready before they ask.

time.morning: Forklifts hum and shift teams prepare for the day's throughput.
time.afternoon: Peak activity runs at full pace through the long afternoon.
time.evening: The evening wind-down begins; conveyors slow to a halt.
time.night: Only automated systems and security patrols operate after hours.

attribute.STRENGTH: The physical scale of this place demands respect. You give it and take it in return.
attribute.PERCEPTION: A building this size hides things easily. You know where to look.
attribute.STEALTH: The noise and scale of the warehouse make you invisible if you want to be.

gender.male: You blend into the shift with ease — just another person on the floor.
gender.female: You stand out enough that a supervisor approaches. That's fine. Supervisors know everything.

manufacturing_facility.default: You step into the manufacturing facility.

time.morning: Day-shift workers take their stations as machines warm up.
time.afternoon: The production floor runs at full capacity through the afternoon.
time.evening: The evening shift takes over without a pause in output.
time.night: Automated lines run without supervision; the night crew is minimal.

attribute.STRENGTH: The raw physical work here resonates with something in you.
attribute.INTELLIGENCE: Process inefficiencies, workflow bottlenecks, safety shortcuts — you catalogue them fast.
attribute.PERCEPTION: One machine has been running slightly off spec. You hear it before anyone tells you.

gender.male: The workers acknowledge you with the brief nod of people who assume you have a reason to be here.
gender.female: The floor manager appears quickly. You use their full attention to get every question answered.

time.morning: Day-shift engineers run diagnostics and review overnight alerts.
time.afternoon: The hum of servers is constant; the temperature is carefully controlled.
time.evening: Routine maintenance windows open as traffic volumes drop.
time.night: The facility never sleeps; automated systems run through the night undisturbed.

attribute.INTELLIGENCE: Rack layouts, network topology, access logs — you understand this infrastructure at a glance.
attribute.PERCEPTION: One rack is running warmer than the others. That's not a cooling fault — that's activity.
attribute.STEALTH: You move with the authority of someone who's supposed to be here. Nobody questions it.

gender.male: The badge on your visitor's lanyard is given less scrutiny than it should be.
gender.female: The engineer on duty is surprised to see you but professional about it. They answer your questions thoroughly.

self_storage.default: You enter the self storage facility.

time.morning: Early customers retrieve or deposit items before the working day.
time.afternoon: A trickle of customers comes and goes through the afternoon.
time.evening: Last access before the facility restricts entry for the night.
time.night: The facility is access-code locked; the corridors are empty and still.

attribute.PERCEPTION: One unit has been accessed more recently than its log suggests.
attribute.STEALTH: The uniform corridors and security gaps are well known to anyone who bothers to look.
attribute.MEMORY: You remember the layout from a previous visit — every corridor, every exit.

gender.male: The desk staff hand you a unit number without looking up.
gender.female: The attendant is more helpful than the job requires. You note the cameras while they talk.

time.morning: The morning service draws a quiet, devoted congregation.
time.afternoon: The church hosts community events and private reflection in the afternoon.
time.evening: Evening prayer brings a smaller, more contemplative group.
time.night: The church is closed; candles flicker in the dark before the altar.

attribute.EMPATHY: You feel the weight of personal prayers and quiet grief in this space.
attribute.CHARISMA: The priest greets you with genuine warmth — community is instinctive for them, and for you.
attribute.INTUITION: This is a place of sanctuary. Whatever you're sensing here doesn't belong.

gender.male: The priest greets you with the measured warmth reserved for unfamiliar visitors.
gender.female: The congregation makes space for you immediately — a woman entering alone is welcome here without question.

time.morning: The Fajr prayer has just concluded; the mosque carries a peaceful stillness.
time.afternoon: The Zuhr congregation gathers for midday prayers.
time.evening: The Maghrib prayer draws a reflective evening group.
time.night: The Isha prayer ends the day; the mosque is quiet before it closes.

attribute.EMPATHY: The sincerity of devotion here is palpable. You respect it without reservation.
attribute.CHARISMA: Community leaders acknowledge you with a measured openness.
attribute.INTUITION: Something about the atmosphere carries a tension beneath the calm.

gender.male: The community is welcoming but measured; they've seen outsiders here before.
gender.female: You're directed courteously to the women's section. The separate space gives you access to conversations the men's side never would.

time.morning: The morning minyan gathers in the main sanctuary for prayer.
time.afternoon: Study sessions and administrative meetings fill the afternoon.
time.evening: Shabbat or weekday evening services bring the community together.
time.night: The synagogue is locked; only the Ner Tamid burns without end.

attribute.EMPATHY: The depth of communal history here is felt, not just observed.
attribute.MEMORY: You are moved by spaces that carry centuries of continuity.
attribute.INTELLIGENCE: The texts, the archives, the history encoded in this building — it's a library as much as a house of worship.

gender.male: The shammes greets you and asks if you need a siddur. You say yes — the gesture puts everyone at ease.
gender.female: The rebbetzin welcomes you personally. Women who come alone to a synagogue are usually here for a reason.

time.morning: The office hums with the energy of early arrivals settling in.
time.afternoon: The office buzzes steadily with the midday workload.
time.evening: Colleagues are packing up their things as evening sets in.
time.night: The office stands dark and empty at this late hour.

attribute.INTELLIGENCE: You immediately map the workspace, noting organizational inefficiencies and potential pressure points.
attribute.PERCEPTION: Small details catch your eye at once — a sticky note with a phone number, an open file on a desk.
attribute.STEALTH: You slip in unnoticed, blending into the background of busy workers.
attribute.EMPATHY: You can feel the undercurrent of stress among the staff even before anyone speaks.

gender.male: You carry the authority of someone used to offices like this.
gender.female: You move through the space with the confidence that comes from knowing exactly what you came for.

time.morning: Early risers fill the gym with focused, purposeful energy.
time.afternoon: A smaller midday crowd works out at a relaxed pace.
time.evening: The after-work crowd makes the gym lively and competitive.
time.night: Only the most dedicated athletes are still here at this hour.

attribute.STRENGTH: You feel right at home among the iron and sweat — this is your territory.
attribute.STAMINA: Your eyes immediately find the cardio section. You could run laps around everyone here.
attribute.INTELLIGENCE: You study the biomechanics of other gym-goers, mentally cataloguing their form and technique.
attribute.AGILITY: You move through the space with ease, already sizing up the open floor for footwork drills.

gender.male: Two regulars offer you a spot within minutes of your warm-up.
gender.female: You move to the free weights. Three people stop what they're doing. You ignore all of them.

time.morning: The morning rush is underway — nurses, doctors, and porters moving briskly.
time.afternoon: The hospital settles into its afternoon rhythm of rounds and consultations.
time.evening: Visiting hours are ending and families are saying their goodbyes.
time.night: Only emergency and night staff are present; the corridors are hushed.

attribute.EMPATHY: You can feel the weight of worry carried by every person you pass.
attribute.INTELLIGENCE: Medical charts and equipment ratings catch your eye — you notice things others walk past.
attribute.STAMINA: The relentless pace of the place energises rather than exhausts you.
attribute.PERCEPTION: You notice a patient being wheeled in whose injuries don't quite match the reported accident.

gender.male: Staff are efficient and professional; nobody offers unsolicited guidance.
gender.female: A nurse stops to ask if you need directions. The pause gives you a moment to observe the ward.

time.morning: Joggers and dog walkers fill the park in the crisp morning air.
time.afternoon: Families and friends relax on the grass in the warm afternoon sun.
time.evening: The park takes on a golden hue as the sun dips low.
time.night: The park is deserted and still; the lamp-posts cast small pools of yellow light.

attribute.PERCEPTION: You notice a discarded item near the bench that most people have walked straight past.
attribute.STAMINA: The open space calls to you; your legs itch to break into a run.
attribute.INTUITION: Despite the peaceful appearance, something at the edge of your awareness nags at you.
attribute.CHARISMA: A couple on a bench waves at you — you have one of those faces people just trust.

gender.male: You walk the paths without drawing particular attention.
gender.female: You take the main path in daylight — a calculation that's second nature.

time.morning: The breakfast crowd lingers over coffee and early plates.
time.afternoon: The lunchtime rush is in full swing, every table occupied.
time.evening: Soft lighting and the murmur of conversation fill the room at dinner.
time.night: The kitchen is winding down; only a few late-night diners remain.

attribute.CHARISMA: The host greets you warmly before you've even said a word.
attribute.PERCEPTION: You scan the room in seconds — who is nervous, who is meeting whom, who doesn't fit.
attribute.EMPATHY: The staff here are tired. You catch the subtle signs and make a point of being patient.
attribute.INTELLIGENCE: The menu is a code of sorts. You order the dish that will take longest to prepare, giving you more time.

gender.male: You take a solo table without issue; the staff treat it as routine.
gender.female: The host seats you with a smile that says solo diners are completely welcome.
